name: Hull Patch Kit
effect: Restores 10 Hull when used at a station.

name: Scanner Array
effect: Reveals adjacent nodes on the map.
flavor: See further. Know more. Fear everything.

name: Reinforced Bulkhead
flavor: Extra plating welded over the weak points.

name: Fuel Recycler
effect: 15% chance to not consume fuel on jump.

name: Med Bay
effect: Crew heal conditions 1 node faster. +5 morale on recruit.

name: Cargo Expander
flavor: Magnetic clamps and a prayer that the inertial dampeners hold.

name: Comms Array
effect: Unlocks hailing options in events. Intercepts nearby transmissions.
flavor: Hear everything. Say the right thing. Or at least say something.

name: Navigation Assist
effect: Reveals 2 additional nodes ahead on the map.
flavor: Predictive routing. Not prediction — just very fast math.

name: Improved Quarters
effect: +5 morale on crew recruit. Crew morale decay reduced.
flavor: Actual mattresses. The luxury of a closed door.

name: Targeting Computer
flavor: It does the math so you can do the violence.

name: Signal Jammer
effect: Blocks enemy reinforcement calls in combat. Hides your transponder.
flavor: They can't call for help if they can't call.

name: Trade Cipher
effect: +15% sell prices at trade posts. Access to restricted market listings.
flavor: The right codes open the right doors. The wrong codes open the airlock.

name: Shield Harmonics
effect: Shields now partially block ballistic weapons (-2 damage). Energy weapons still fully blocked.
flavor: Frequency modulation turns kinetic impacts into heat dissipation. Mostly.

name: Advanced Med Bay
effect: Crew heal all conditions between nodes. Can stabilize critically wounded crew.
flavor: Surgical suite, cryopod, and a medic who knows which is which.

name: Remnant Memory Core
effect: Generates 1 Resonance per node. Ancient data fragments surface unpredictably.
flavor: it remembers things that haven't happened yet. or things that already did, somewhere else.

name: Nexus Cortex
effect: Generates 2 Resonance per node. Reveals Nexus Anomaly nodes.
flavor: it sees what you see. it remembers what you forget.
